workflow.desc: Analyze UI codebase to extract styles, patterns, and conventions

field.name: source_path
field.desc: Path to UI source code directory

field.name: output_path
field.desc: Output directory for generated style guide

block.field: FORBIDDEN: create_file for analysis documents — NEVER use create_file to write any UI analysis document
FORBIDDEN: Full-file rewrite — NEVER replace the entire document content in a single operation
Each document MUST be created by copying the appropriate template then filling sections with search_replace
MANDATORY: Template-first workflow — For every output document, copy the corresponding template to target path first, then fill sections with search_replace
Skipping copy and writing content directly is FORBIDDEN

block.desc: Read all template files to understand document structures
block.field: - templates/UI-STYLE-GUIDE-TEMPLATE.md → ui-style-guide.md - templates/PAGE-TYPE-SUMMARY-TEMPLATE.md → page-types/page-type-summary.md - templates/PAGE-TYPE-INDIVIDUAL-TEMPLATE.md → page-types/[type]-pages.md - templates/COMPONENT-LIBRARY-TEMPLATE.md → components/component-library.md - templates/COMMON-COMPONENTS-TEMPLATE.md → components/common-components.md - templates/BUSINESS-COMPONENTS-TEMPLATE.md → components/business-components.md - templates/COMPONENT-INDIVIDUAL-TEMPLATE.md → components/{component-name}.md - templates/LAYOUT-PATTERNS-TEMPLATE.md → layouts/page-layouts.md - templates/NAVIGATION-PATTERNS-TEMPLATE.md → layouts/navigation-patterns.md - templates/LAYOUT-INDIVIDUAL-TEMPLATE.md → layouts/{layout-name}-layout.md - templates/STYLE-SYSTEM-TEMPLATE.md → styles/color-system.md - templates/TYPOGRAPHY-TEMPLATE.md → styles/typography.md - templates/SPACING-TEMPLATE.md → styles/spacing-system.md
STOP and report error with template path

sequence.name: UI Style Analysis
sequence.desc: Discover, analyze, and document UI patterns

block.field: - src/views/ or src/pages/ - Page components - src/components/ - Reusable components - src/layout/ or src/layouts/ - Layout components - src/styles/ or src/assets/styles/ - Style files
ui-style-guide.md Sections: Project Overview, Platform Summary

File Name Analysis: - Extract naming patterns from page files - Group files by similar naming conventions - Examples: *List.vue, *Form.vue, *Detail.vue, *Chart.vue
Component Usage Analysis: - Identify dominant components in each file group - Table-heavy files → likely list/query pages - Form-heavy files → likely create/edit pages - Chart-heavy files → likely report/dashboard pages
Route/Navigation Analysis: - Check router configuration for page organization - Identify menu structures and page hierarchies
templates/PAGE-TYPE-SUMMARY-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/page-types/page-type-summary.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/PAGE-TYPE-INDIVIDUAL-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/page-types/${page_type.name}-pages.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections

UI Framework Components (Element Plus, Ant Design, Vant): - Button, Input, Select, Table, Form, Modal, etc.
Common Components (Project-specific): - SearchForm, Pagination, DictTag, ImagePreview, etc.
Business Components (Domain-specific): - UserSelect, DeptTree, RolePicker, etc.
templates/COMPONENT-LIBRARY-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/components/component-library.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/COMMON-COMPONENTS-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/components/common-components.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/BUSINESS-COMPONENTS-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/components/business-components.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/COMPONENT-INDIVIDUAL-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/components/${component.name}.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
- For UI framework components: Focus on project-specific usage patterns - For custom components: Full Props/Events/Slots documentation - Skip trivial components (< 10 lines, no props/events)

Standard List Layout: - Search Form - Toolbar (Add/Export/Delete buttons) - Data Table - Pagination
Standard Form Layout: - Form Card - Form Fields (2-3 columns) - Action Buttons (Submit/Cancel)
Detail View Layout: - Detail Card - Description List - Action Buttons
Split Pane Layout: - Left: Tree/Menu - Right: Content Table/Form
templates/LAYOUT-PATTERNS-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/layouts/page-layouts.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/NAVIGATION-PATTERNS-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/layouts/navigation-patterns.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/LAYOUT-INDIVIDUAL-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/layouts/${layout.name}-layout.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
- Minimum 2 pages must share a layout pattern to warrant a document - Generate ASCII layout diagram from actual page structure

block.desc: Analyze style files for color, typography, spacing
block.field:
Color System: - Primary colors, Status colors, Text colors, Background colors, Border colors
Typography: - Font families, Font sizes, Font weights, Line heights
Spacing System: - Padding/Margin scales, Grid system, Container widths
templates/STYLE-SYSTEM-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/styles/color-system.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/TYPOGRAPHY-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/styles/typography.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/SPACING-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/styles/spacing-system.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
templates/UI-STYLE-GUIDE-TEMPLATE.md
${output_path}/ui-style-guide.md
copy template, then use search_replace to fill sections
ui-style-guide.md should reference/link to all other generated documents

- ui-style-guide.md - page-types/page-type-summary.md - page-types/[type]-pages.md (one per discovered type) - components/component-library.md - components/common-components.md - components/business-components.md - components/{component-name}.md (one per discovered component) - layouts/page-layouts.md - layouts/navigation-patterns.md - layouts/{layout-name}-layout.md (one per discovered layout) - styles/color-system.md - styles/typography.md - styles/spacing-system.md
